steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the dropdown menu within the "New Project" dialog to select the application type "Apps for Microsoft 365."
Click on the "Other Teams Capabilities" dropdown option within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" modal to select the description "App that uses tab, bot, and message extension."
Click the "Simple Bot" option in the dropdown menu under "Teams Capability" to select a simple implementation for customization.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu located at the top of the interface.
Click on the "Default folder" option located in the dropdown menu for selecting the project root folder in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Close" button (red "X") at the top-right corner of the Microsoft Teams window to close the application tab.
Press the "F1" key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code, providing access to various commands and features relevant to debugging and code execution.

parameters.text: Microsoft 365 Agents:Publish to Store in Developer Portal

steps.description: Type text into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette (activated via "Ctrl+Shift+P" or "Cmd+Shift+P") and initiate the command `Microsoft 365 Agents: Publish to Store in Developer Portal`, highlighting the matching option in the dropdown menu.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the command "Microsoft 365 Agents: Publish to Store in Developer Portal" in the command palette of Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Browse..." button in the "Select Your App Package" dialog box located within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click on the "appPackage" folder in the file explorer under the "vscode" directory path to select it.
Click the "Open" button positioned at the bottom-right corner of the file dialog interface to confirm the selection of the folder or file.
Click the "Open" button in the file selection dialog to confirm the chosen folder named "build."
Click the "Open" button in the bottom-right corner of the file selection dialog to confirm and open the selected file ("appPackage.local.zip").
Click on the "appPackage.local.zip" file path displayed within the confirmation dialog box titled "Select Your App Package" at coordinates (393, 80).
Click the "Open" button in the confirmation dialog prompting whether to open an external website within the Visual Studio Code application interface.
Type ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}}  into the password input field on the Microsoft login page.
Click the "Sign in" button in the Microsoft login interface to proceed with authentication.
Click the "Yes" button in the Microsoft login prompt to confirm staying signed in.
Click the "Publish your app" button located in the "Publish to your org" section of the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
@assertion 'Status  Submitted' is exist
Click the "Close" button (X icon) in the top-right corner of the "Apps: Developer Portal" interface to exit the application page, located at coordinates (1007, 20).
Click the "Leave" button in the confirmation dialog titled "Leave site?", which warns about unsaved changes in the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
